description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this backpack from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't be deceived by its compact look - there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Height: 23 cm Width: 38 cm Made of nylon for durability and comfort One pocket on the front One roomy compartment with velcro closures at the back, along with a smaller zippered compartment One waist strap with a click lock Single adjustable strap to hang the bag from the shoulder Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Brand tab appliqué d on the side Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
